action_instruction: PRIMARY: wait for the hangout submission to finish and the "Log a hangout" modal to close automatically
intent: PRIMARY: wait for the hangout submission to finish and the "Log a hangout" modal to close automatically

action_params.until_condition: the "Log a hangout" dialog is no longer visible (no modal overlay on screen)

until_condition: the "Log a hangout" dialog is no longer visible (no modal overlay on screen)
generated_code:
async def run_test():
    _condition_met = False
    _until_retries = 0
    while _until_retries < 10:
        print(f"[until-loop] iteration {_until_retries + 1}/10")
        async with testmu.step('Wait 1500ms until condition'):
            await page.wait_for_timeout(1500)
        await page.wait_for_timeout(500)
        if await testmu.check_until_condition(page, 'the "Log a hangout" dialog is no longer visible (no modal overlay on screen)'):
            _condition_met = True
            break
        _until_retries += 1
    set_var("__result__", {"condition_met": _condition_met, "retries": _until_retries + 1})
